_comment: Hand-tweakable layout for the <Roofline> component. Dot positions (x=arithmetic intensity, y=throughput) come from the board JSON; THIS file only controls how each label is drawn and where. Keyed by rung name. dx/dy are pixel offsets of the label from its dot; anchor is start|middle|end. Edit freely - it does not depend on board measurements.
title: Roofline - PYNQ-Z2 @ 62.5 MHz
